case_title: RICHARD W. KRIEGER VS. VERTRANS, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, AKA VERTRANS E

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KRIEGER, RICHARD W. AS TO DEFENDANT VERTRANS, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, AKA VERTRANS ELEVATOR CO. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
